task_completion.description: Verify that the chinook.odb database is opened in LibreOffice Base.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base main window is visible with 'chinook.odb' or 'chinook' in the application title bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'VIP_Customers' query.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Queries section of LibreOffice Base, 'VIP_Customers' is listed, or there is an open query design/results window with this name showing columns for Customer LastName and TotalSpent.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Top_Artists' query.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Queries section of LibreOffice Base, 'Top_Artists' is listed, or there is an open query design/results window with this name showing columns for Artist Name and TrackCount.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'ManagerDashboard' form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Forms section of LibreOffice Base, a form named 'ManagerDashboard' is listed.

task_completion.description: Verify the ManagerDashboard form contains a table control displaying VIP_Customers data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManagerDashboard form is open and shows a grid/table control containing customer last names and total spent amounts (values > 40).

task_completion.description: Verify the ManagerDashboard form contains a table control displaying Top_Artists data simultaneously.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same open ManagerDashboard form shows a second grid/table control containing artist names and track counts (values > 50) visible at the same time as the VIP customers table.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to create the queries and form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Base GUI being actively used, such as the Query Design view, Form Design view, or Base wizards, rather than terminal windows executing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the form is a genuine LibreOffice Base form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The form is viewed within the LibreOffice Base environment, with standard Base form controls, record navigation toolbars, and window frames visible, not mocked up in a spreadsheet or text document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not hardcode the expected output into static tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables in the form appear to be genuine data-bound table controls (e.g., showing record selectors or navigation bars at the bottom of the table control) rather than static text boxes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database path is '/home/ga/chinook.odb'. The first query must be named exactly 'VIP_Customers' and filter for spending > 40. The second query must be named exactly 'Top_Artists' and filter for tracks > 50. The form must be named exactly 'ManagerDashboard'.
